all_trials.title: Efficacy of Light Therapy in Treatment of Chronic Cluster Headache
all_trials.what_tested: Light therapy (bright light delivered via consumer device) as a preventive treatment for chronic cluster headache, based on CH being a circadian rhythm disorder.
all_trials.patient_relevance: If light therapy helps reset the circadian rhythm disruption in CH, it would be a simple, side-effect-free addition to treatment -- especially for patients with seasonal patterns.

all_trials.title: Yogabased Movements for Primary Headaches (Migraine and/or Cluster Headache) - YOURHEAD - a Pilot Study
all_trials.what_tested: Web-based or face-to-face yoga-based movement program as a complementary treatment for migraine and/or cluster headache, focusing on sleep quality and mental health.
all_trials.key_result: Recruiting 40 participants, expected completion May 2026. This is a pilot feasibility study, not primarily CH-specific.
all_trials.patient_relevance: Yoga may help with sleep and wellbeing for CH patients, but this is a feasibility study focused mainly on migraine -- do not expect breakthrough CH results.

all_trials.title: Yogabased Movements for Primary Headaches (Migraine and/or Cluster Headache) - YOURHEAD
all_trials.what_tested: Randomized controlled trial of web-based or face-to-face yoga for migraine and/or cluster headache versus conventional treatment.
all_trials.key_result: Not yet recruiting, expected to start March 2026 with 80 participants. This is the full RCT following the pilot study.
all_trials.patient_relevance: If yoga significantly improves quality of life for CH patients, it could be a low-risk complementary approach -- but this is mainly a migraine study.

all_trials.title: Actigraphy and Nocturnal Heartrate Variability in Cluster Headache Patients
all_trials.what_tested: Using actigraphy (wrist activity monitors) and heart rate variability to study the relationship between sleep, autonomic nervous system function, and cluster headache attacks.
all_trials.key_result: Completed with 20 participants but no results posted. This was an observational study comparing bout and remission phases.
all_trials.patient_relevance: Understanding the sleep-autonomic-headache connection could lead to better timing of preventive medications or sleep-based interventions.

all_trials.title: Personality, Defences, Central Sensitization, and Trauma in Women With Chronic Migraine, Fibromyalgia, and Vulvodynia
all_trials.what_tested: Studying psychological factors (personality traits, defense mechanisms, trauma history) in women with chronic migraine, fibromyalgia, and vulvodynia.
all_trials.key_result: Completed with 1,006 participants. This was not a cluster headache study.
all_trials.patient_relevance: Not directly relevant to CH -- this studied psychological factors in other chronic pain conditions.
